pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or lack of support for newer features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 17; keeping java.version at 11 would cause the build to target the wrong bytecode version or fail if the build tool enforces JDK alignment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the flyway-database-postgresql dependency to support PostgreSQL database migrations in Flyway.
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway 9+ (used in Spring Boot 3) removed database-specific drivers from the core module; without this dependency, PostgreSQL migrations will fail at runtime with a missing driver error.
